title: abutilon exonemum
intro: Abutilon exonemum, also known as the yellow mallow or abutilon, is a plant species within the malvaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The abutilon plant offers numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Abutilon exonemum can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
